channel.title: Realm of the Mad God on Chasing Dings!
channel.description: Recent content in Realm of the Mad God on Chasing Dings!

item.title: The Official, Scientific, 2023 List of Popular MMORPGs
item.description: Here we go again. The top 38 MMOs in the last 30 days in the USA, as reported by Google Trends.

item.title: D3: You've Defeated Diablo III
item.description:
As hellspawn go, Diablo has to be feeling pretty useless. We didn’t beat Diablo 3 last night; we beat Diablo #412. He dies so often, and it’s not exaggerating to say that he was the wimpiest boss we faced in Inferno mode.

Once we dropped to Monster Level 0, the run was no different than it had been in Normal, or Nightmare, or Hell – it’s always the same game.
